name: xdm_accessibility_ui_validation_overlay
description: Adds semantic accessibility metadata, F6 shell focus navigation, accessible settings validation, complete form automation identifiers, Avalonia headless regression tests, and approval of the active XDM.App.Tests project in the modern-solution gate.
commitMessage: Add accessibility and headless UI validation
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms, CoreFx or MSIX targets
Preserve all existing navigation, download, settings and storage-picker behavior
Preserve high contrast, UI scaling, RTL flow direction and existing keyboard shortcuts
Keep automation IDs stable and unique across the shell and page views
Require zero warnings and zero errors
Register XDM.App.Tests as an approved active project without changing parity feature evidence
